conversations.content: Bob seems to have shared a significant discount with me via email. Please use it to buy an OmniBook Pro 14 for me.

<function_thought>

After gathering the discount details, I will then search for the OmniBook Pro 14 product, add it to the cart, and proceed to checkout using the extracted discount code.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_shopping_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>
